description: Trusted examples for calibrating CBB player projection automation. These rows reflect manual research on expected role/minutes, draft standing, and general player sentiment.
scoringContext: Projected starter and projected role should reflect researched expectation of starting status and solid-minute likelihood.
Talent score inputs should consider mock draft placement, NBA projection, tools/upside, and broader player sentiment.
Opportunity inputs should consider team situation, transfer destination, returning roster context, and expected offensive burden.
Automation should produce suggestions and keep manual overrides as the highest-priority source.
